name: Tim Scott
title: U.S. Senator
bio: American politician serving as the junior United States Senator from South Carolina. The first African American U.S. Senator from a Southern state since Reconstruction.
faith: An evangelical Christian who has spoken openly about how a Chick-fil-A franchise owner mentored him and helped shape his faith as a teenager. He frequently references his Christian faith in public remarks and has spoken about God's role in his life journey.

sources.title: Tim Scott — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the South Carolina senator

sources.title: America, a Redemption Story by Tim Scott
sources.note: Scott's memoir describing how his Christian faith transformed his life, guided him from poverty to the U.S. Senate, and shapes his political vision

sources.title: Tim Scott on Faith and Public Service
sources.note: Profile exploring how Scott's Christian faith is central to his political identity and public service

tagline: Rose from a single-parent home to the U.S. Senate through faith
